content_clean: 🟢 Statement | 8/10 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 Trump says US would take over Cuba if it invades US President Donald Trump has made a striking statement regarding a potential invasion scenario involving Cuba. According to him, in the event of aggression against the island nation, the United States would immediately take control of it. The politician also mentioned an architect with a 'beautiful Hispanic flair' who allegedly worked on the corresponding plan. This statement comes amid escalating geopolitical tensions in the Caribbean basin. Experts note that such rhetoric may indicate a hardening of Washington's stance toward Havana. OSINT NewsGroup US Cuba Statement Geopolitics

🟢 NavalBlockade | 9/10 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump: US Navy acting 'like pirates' in blockade of Iranian ports President Trump stated the US Navy is acting 'like pirates' to carry out a naval blockade of Iranian ports, confirming an active US naval operation against Iran. OSINT NewsGroup US Iran NavalBlockade Geopolitics
